M1890_CU_PHONE_USE M1890 (M0770) Current Phone Use This field indicates the patient's current ability to answer the phone safely, including dialing numbers, and effectively using the telephone to communicate. 00 = Able to dial numbers and answer calls appropriately and as desired.
01 = Able to use a specially adapted telephone (i.e., large numbers on the dial, teletype phone for the deaf) and call essential numbers.
02 = Able to answer
